description: Hospitality sector (NAICS 72*) exposure at 60% of Tier 1 capital — exceeds the 50% bank-policy hospitality cap; breach expected

expected_output.regulation: OCC Concentration Guidance / Bank Policy Hospitality Limit

regulatory_basis: OCC Concentration Guidance / Bank Policy — hospitality sector exposure exceeds the 50% Tier 1 capital cap and must be escalated to the credit committee
